name: siproper-pusaka-realtime
description: SIPROPER PUSAKA realtime multi-user MVP (Express + React)

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n server,client -c auto "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && node server/scripts/copy-client-build.js
scripts.setup:win: node "%npm_execpath%" install --prefix server && node "%npm_execpath%" install --prefix client
scripts.setup:nix: node "$npm_execpath" install --prefix server && node "$npm_execpath" install --prefix client
